senses.definition: an outdoor area with paved floor belonging to a house used for sitting, relaxing or eating in

examples.x: They enjoy dining al fresco on their patio during warm summer evenings.
The patio is furnished with comfortable lounge chairs and a table for outdoor gatherings.
She decorated the patio with potted plants and string lights to create a cozy atmosphere.
The patio overlooks a garden and provides a peaceful retreat from city life.
The new house has a spacious patio where they plan to host barbecues and family gatherings.

senses.definition: a type of furniture specifically designed for outdoor use on patios, decks, or in gardens

examples.x: The patio furniture is perfect for lounging in the sun during the summer months.
We bought new patio furniture for our backyard so we could host barbecues.
They set up patio furniture on the deck for their outdoor dinner party.
After cleaning the patio furniture, we arranged it around the fire pit for cozy evenings.

senses.definition: the land joined to our house where we can grow grass, flowers, and other plants

examples.x: I saw a squirrel running across the yard.
Our dog loves running around in the yard.
The children played games in the yard.
We set up a swing set in the yard.

senses.definition: a large container, often made of wood, that can be filled with hot water and is big enough to fit several people

examples.x: After a long day of hiking, they enjoyed soaking in the hot tub to relax their muscles.
They decided to install a hot tub in their backyard to make their home more relaxing.
The hot tub was the perfect place to unwind on a chilly evening.
He slipped into the hot tub, letting the warm water ease the tension in his back.

senses.definition: a specially designed structure that holds water for people to swim in

examples.x: The hotel had a large swimming pool where guests could relax and swim.
We spent the afternoon lounging by the community swimming pool.
My friend's backyard has a small, but refreshing, swimming pool.
The resort's swimming pool overlooked the ocean, offering stunning views.
After work, I like to unwind by taking a dip in the indoor swimming pool.

senses.definition: a structure or outdoor feature designed to contain an open fire, typically made of metal, stone, or brick, and used for warmth, cooking, or entertainment purposes

examples.x: We gathered around the fire pit in the backyard, enjoying the warmth on a chilly evening.
The fire pit was perfect for roasting marshmallows during our camping trip.
He built a small fire pit out of bricks in the garden for weekend cookouts.
We enjoyed the crackling sound of the fire pit while watching the stars.
She added some logs to the fire pit, making the flames grow higher and brighter.

senses.definition: a plastic or metal container with a lid, used for putting garbage in and usually kept outside the house

examples.x: He emptied the full trash can into the larger dumpster outside.
He found a discarded toy in the trash can and decided to keep it.
Sarah used a trash can with a lid to prevent odors.
She accidentally knocked over the trash can, spilling its contents.
The children threw the crumpled paper balls into the classroom trash can.

senses.definition: a device used for hanging and drying clothes outdoors, typically consisting of a pole or frame with lines or ropes for suspending clothing items
a flat metal structure used for cooking food over an open fire

examples.x: He placed the steaks on the grill over the campfire.
Smoke rose as the vegetables sizzled on the grill.
They installed a new grill in their backyard for summer barbecues.
The chef adjusted the heat on the grill to cook the meat evenly.

senses.definition: a shallow basin filled with water, placed outdoors to provide a drinking and bathing spot for birds

examples.x: The garden is full of life, with birds frequently visiting the bird bath to drink and bathe.
She placed a bird bath near the flowers to attract more birds to her garden.
On warm afternoons, the birds enjoy cooling off in the bird bath by the oak tree.
He cleaned the bird bath every week to make sure it was safe for the birds.
We spotted several colorful birds around the bird bath this morning, enjoying the cool water.

senses.definition: a large bath or pool equipped with a system that pumps hot water around, making it move in different directions and around one's body to provide a pleasant relaxing feeling
a cylindrical oven, often made of clay or metal, commonly used in South Asian and Middle Eastern cuisine for baking bread

examples.x: The restaurant's specialty is its freshly baked naan cooked in a traditional tandoor oven.
The chef prepares flavorful kebabs by marinating the meat and then cooking them in the tandoor.
The clay tandoor in the kitchen is fired up early in the morning to prepare for lunch service.
Guests enjoyed watching the skilled chef bake flatbreads in the tandoor during the cooking demonstration.
The family gathered around the tandoor in the backyard, eagerly awaiting the delicious aroma of freshly baked naan and sizzling tandoori dishes for their weekend barbecue.

senses.definition: a big metal container for burning coal or charcoal to keep people warm outdoors

examples.x: During the winter festival, the city set up braziers along the streets to keep attendees warm.
The camping site provided each tent with a small brazier to ensure warmth during chilly nights.
The outdoor cafe installed braziers on the patio, allowing customers to enjoy the evening despite the cold weather.
The workers huddled around the brazier during their break to stay warm on the construction site.
The park rangers placed braziers at strategic locations to offer warmth to hikers on the trail during the winter months.

senses.definition: a metal object attached to the top of a building in order to indicate the wind direction by turning toward or pointing its direction

examples.x: The weathervane on top of the barn spun wildly during the storm.
The rooster-shaped weathervane is a popular choice for many farmhouse roofs.
As the wind changed direction, the weathervane turned to point toward the east.
We could tell the storm was coming because the weathervane started spinning faster.
They installed a new weathervane in the garden to decorate the shed and show wind direction.

senses.definition: a type of bed made of a net or a large piece of cloth tied between two posts, trees, etc. in a way that it remains suspended and gently swings
a type of umbrella designed to provide shade from the sun

examples.x: She opened her parasol to shield herself from the harsh midday sun.
The parasol on the patio provided much-needed shade during the summer picnic.
They sat under a colorful parasol by the beach, enjoying the warm breeze.
The garden looked even more beautiful with a white parasol near the flowerbeds.
He used a parasol to protect his skin while walking through the park.

senses.definition: a type of antenna used to receive signals from satellites orbiting the earth, typically for television or internet services

examples.x: The satellite dish on the roof allows us to watch satellite TV channels from around the world.
We had to install a larger satellite dish to improve the signal strength for our internet connection.
The technician came to fix the satellite dish after it was damaged during a storm.
He adjusted the angle of the satellite dish to get a clearer picture on the TV.

senses.definition: a box outside the house were letters and packages are put

examples.x: Every day, I check the mailbox for the letter I'm expecting.
My mailbox is full of junk mail and advertisements.
Please put the letter in the mailbox.
The paint on the mailbox is peeling off and needs to be refreshed.
The storm knocked over our mailbox last night.

senses.definition: a cooking device used for grilling food, typically consisting of a metal grate placed over an open flame or heat source
a small, enclosed area that is situated at the back of a house and is usually covered with a lawn or other vegetation

examples.x: The kids spent the afternoon playing in the backyard.
They set up a barbecue in the backyard for the summer party.
Her backyard garden is full of flowers and vegetables.
We installed a small pool in the backyard for the hot days.
The dog loves running around in the backyard chasing birds.

senses.definition: the outdoor area located at the front of a residential property, typically between the house and the street, often used for landscaping, gardens, and providing an aesthetic appearance to the property

examples.x: The children played soccer in the front yard all afternoon.
She planted colorful flowers in the front yard to make the house look more welcoming.
The dog loves to run around in the front yard every morning.
We decided to put up a fence in the front yard for more privacy.
He mowed the grass in the front yard before the guests arrived.

senses.definition: a covered area at the entrance of a house, typically extending from the front of the building and providing a space for relaxation or socializing

examples.x: The family sat on the front porch, sipping lemonade and enjoying the sunset.
The front porch provided a shady spot to relax during the hot summer afternoon.
She decorated the front porch with pumpkins and flowers for the fall season.
He placed a rocking chair on the front porch to enjoy reading his books outside.
The kids left their bicycles leaning against the railing on the front porch.

senses.definition: a structure with a roof and no walls at the entrance of a house

examples.x: We sat on the porch swing and watched the sunset.
During summer storms, we gather on the screened porch to listen to the rain.
The porch wraps around the house, providing ample space for outdoor furniture.
I love decorating the porch with potted plants and colorful flowers.

senses.definition: a platform or floor that has a design that looks like a ship's deck

examples.x: The restaurant's outdoor seating area featured a spacious wooden deck with ocean views.
The hotel suite included a private deck overlooking the beach.
The backyard deck was the perfect place for summer barbecues and gatherings.
They spent the evening stargazing from the deck of their lakeside cabin.
The home's deck had railings and furniture designed to mimic a ship's deck.

senses.definition: a metal container of water, special gas, or foam used to stop a fire from burning

examples.x: The kitchen has a fire extinguisher mounted on the wall for safety.
She quickly grabbed the fire extinguisher when the stove flames grew out of control.
He used the fire extinguisher to put out the small fire in the trash can.
Every classroom in the school is equipped with a fire extinguisher near the door.
The fire safety training included lessons on how to use a fire extinguisher properly.

senses.definition: a roofed area with an open front at the ground level, which is attached to the side of a house

examples.x: The colonial-style house had a wide, wraparound veranda where residents could relax and enjoy the breeze.
The hotel's veranda overlooked the ocean, offering guests a picturesque spot to sip their morning coffee.
The Victorian mansion had a charming veranda adorned with wicker furniture and potted plants.
The café's outdoor seating area spilled out onto a shaded veranda, creating a cozy atmosphere for patrons.
The farmhouse had a rustic veranda with a porch swing, providing a serene setting for watching the sunset.

senses.definition: a platform above the ground level and on the outside wall of a building that we can get into from the upper floor

examples.x: She enjoyed her morning coffee on the balcony, taking in the beautiful view of the city skyline.
The hotel room had a private balcony that overlooked the ocean, making it the perfect spot for sunset watching.
He decorated the balcony with potted plants and string lights to create a cozy outdoor space.
During the summer, the family often hosted barbecues on their balcony, enjoying the warm weather.
The concert was held in the theater, and she had a great seat on the balcony, giving her a bird's-eye view of the performance.
